title: Gold Radical Rick Supercross Bobblehead
source_title: Gold Radical Rick Supercross Bobble Head
issue_title: The Cast Steps Off the Page
creator_display: Damian X. Fulton and Supercross BMX / Bill Ryan collaboration
edition_display: One of 45 according to the inventory
alt: Boxed gold Radical Rick Supercross bobblehead with comic-panel graphics and product text on the package.
summary: A commemorative Radical Rick bobblehead produced for the character’s 45th anniversary through a collaboration between Damian Fulton and Supercross BMX founder Bill Ryan. Finished in gold-plated style resin, only 45 units were produced worldwide. Each example is hand-signed and numbered by Fulton, representing a modern collectible celebrating the enduring influence of Radical Rick within BMX culture.
provenance: Source recorded as Supercross BMX in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: Production quantity, material and signature details are preserved from the inventory and linked product source.
details: Gold-plated-style resin finish according to the inventory.
Produced for Radical Rick’s 45th anniversary according to the inventory.
Edition of 45 and hand-signed numbering attributed to Damian Fulton in the inventory.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
